volumeSize._note: INHERITED from the upstream volume effect (ui.control=false). Drives ONLY the voxel/slice atlas math (volumeToAtlas y + z*volSize), NOT the atlas RenderTexture dimensions (those come from volumeCache's own size). The runtime broadcasts the upstream volumeSize into this consumer (see reference 04 inheritsVolumeSize).

filtering._note: Reference bakes this as a compile-time #define / WGSL const (perf-only: the shader picks between two completely different raymarch paths, isosurface vs voxel; baking lets the optimizer drop the unused path in a 14kB shader). HLSL declares it as an int uniform 'FILTERING' and branches at runtime ([branch]); values identical. 0 = isosurface (smooth trilinear + bisection), 1 = voxel (DDA flat-face). Default 0.

invert._note: Reference bakes this as a compile-time #define / WGSL const (perf-only: eliminates a per-sample branch in getField/isVoxelSolid that runs on every raymarch step). HLSL declares it as an int uniform 'INVERT' (1/0) tested != 0 at runtime. Default 0 (false).

render3d._note: WGSL binds resolution/time/threshold/volumeSize/orbitSpeed/bgColor/bgAlpha/volumeCache/tileOffset/fullResolution as separate bindings (@binding 0..9). FILTERING/INVERT are injected consts (compile-time) in the reference and NOT in any buffer; in the HLSL port they are the int uniforms FILTERING/INVERT set per frame. This slot map is illustrative; the HLSL backend sets all params as individual named uniforms by reference name. resolution/time/tileOffset/fullResolution are engine globals (NMFullscreen aliases).

passes.name: render
passes._role: RAYMARCH CONSUMER (MRT, drawBuffers:2). Runs at SCREEN resolution (viewport NOT overridden) — NM_FragCoord yields screen pixel coords; uv = ((fragCoord+tileOffset) - 0.5*fullRes)/fullRes.y. Reads the vol-tier atlas volumeCache (inputTex3d) by INTEGER texel fetch (textureLoad -> .Load) via volumeToAtlas = int2(x, y + z*volSize); analyticalGeo (inputGeo) is bound per the inputs map but unreferenced by the shader (matches the WGSL, which declares only volumeCache). Orbiting camera (camDist 3.5, angle=time*TAU*orbitSpeed); WGSL flips uv.y for the view ray (uvFlipped). FILTERING=0 -> isosurface trace (stepSize 1.5/volSize, MAX_STEPS=256, 8-iter bisection); FILTERING=1 -> DDA voxelTrace (loop MAX_STEPS*2=512). depth = hitDist / MAX_DIST(10.0). Writes color (gamma 1/2.2) to SV_Target0 (color->outputTex) and (normal*0.5+0.5, depth) to SV_Target1 (geoOut->screenGeoBuffer). volumeSize INHERITED from upstream (inheritsVolumeSize).

screenGeoBuffer._role: GEO output (geo-tier surface, reference 04 §8: xyz=normal, w=depth). Screen-resolution 2D RenderTexture, rgba16f LINEAR. Written by the render MRT SV_Target1 (geoOut): xyz = surface normal encoded *0.5+0.5, w = hitDist/MAX_DIST (or default 1.0 on miss). Exposed downstream as outputGeo for screen-space post-processing. width/height = 'resolution' (screen size; resolveDimension 'auto'/'screen' -> screenSize, reference 04 §9).

render3d._comment: FIRST true RAYMARCH-CONSUMER port (all existing synth3d/filter3d 3D effects are volume WRITERS that fill the 64x4096 vol atlas; render3d READS that atlas and renders it to a 2D screen image). Single fullscreen RAYMARCH pass with MRT (drawBuffers:2). NO feedback, NO geometry/scatter, NO loop. The pass runs at SCREEN resolution (viewport NOT overridden); the volume atlas is addressed by INTEGER texel fetch (volumeToAtlas = int2(x, y + z*volSize), 64 slices of 64x64 by default), reproduced EXACTLY from the WGSL (matches the synth3d writers). volumeSize is INHERITED from the upstream volume effect (definition.js ui.control=false) and drives only the slice math, not the atlas RT dims. FILTERING (isosurface vs voxel) and INVERT (per-sample threshold invert) were compile-time injected consts in WGSL/GLSL (perf-only DCE of the unused path / per-sample branch); the HLSL port models them as runtime int uniforms (PORTING-GUIDE 'Compile-time defines'), branched with [branch]. Per golden rule #1 (port from WGSL): the WGSL flips uv.y for the camera ray (uvFlipped); the GLSL twin uses raw uv (bottom-left origin reconciled elsewhere). We port the WGSL form, so no extra Y flip. 'time' is normalized 0..1 (engine global). select(resolution, fullResolution, fullResolution.x>0) + fullRes.x<1 -> (1024,1024) fallback reproduced literally. No '_iteration' uniform; no repeat; no drawMode/count.
render3d.voxelToAtlasMapping: atlasTexel = int2(x, y + z*volSize); read by Texture2D.Load (integer texel fetch, point)
